case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF VS. GUADALUPE GODINEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RODERICK SHEHEE--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 90.50 - SERVED NOV-15-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GODINEZ, GUADALUPE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,736.71 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT GODINEZ, GUADALUPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GODINEZ, GUADALUPE $1,736.71 PRINCIPAL, $90.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,827.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
